codeReview.summary: This fix adequately resolves the prior blocking failure: business-entity detection now uses normalized token/word-boundary matching in scrapers/sunbiz.py, which removes substring false positives (e.g., VINCENT/LINCOLN) while preserving true positives for entity-token names (e.g., PROPERTIES LLC, INC). Because scrapers/voter_lookup.py consumes this shared helper, voter enrichment no longer skips those personal-name leads, and the added regression tests validate both classifier behavior and end-to-end enrichment behavior.

summary: Reviewed fix-voter-entity-detection as a rerun against the prior voter-pipeline-infrastructure failure. Commit ceda497 updates shared entity classification to token-based matching and adds targeted regressions in tests/test_voter_lookup.py; the original false-positive skip path is now closed with no new blocking defects identified.
